claims.text: I am writing to express my interest in the position, bringing hands-on experience building deterministic Python rendering pipelines that match the requirements in your posting.
My background in structured document generation and quality-gated automation maps directly onto the responsibilities you describe, and I would welcome the chance to contribute.
claims.reframing_note: Reframed existing experience to foreground fit for the offer.

claims.text: Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to discussing how I can support your team.
